data.title: India's energy industry research report for 2025-2035 predicts renewables dominance, with a shift in energy supply mix, demanding smart investments and scalable technologies.
data.description: A report titled "India's Energy Future: Demand-supply Dynamics Amid Renewable Energy Growth & Energy Storage Revolution By 2035" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. By 2035, India's energy supply mix is forecasted to experience a notable change, with renewables and emerging energy sources taking the lead role. The country's transition towards clean energy is rapidly progressing and is a prevalent trend that requires strategic investments and scalable technologies to achieve success.
Putin met India's National Security Adviser Doval - RIA.

data.title: ConocoPhillips beat Q2 earnings estimates, reporting $2.0 billion profit, $1.56 per share, on $14.74 billion revenue. Total production rose to 2,391 MBOED, a 3% increase.
data.description: ConocoPhillips reported second-quarter 2025 earnings of $2.0 billion, or $1.56 per share, compared to $2.3 billion, or $1.98 per share, in the same quarter last year. Adjusted earnings were $1.8 billion, or $1.42 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.40. Revenue for the quarter stood at $14.74 billion, higher than the expected $14.63 billion. Total production rose to 2,391 MBOED, up by 446 MBOED from the previous year, with a 3% increase when adjusted for acquisitions and dispositions. Lower 48 output was at 1,508 MBOED, including 845 MBOED from the Permian, 408 MBOED from the Eagle Ford, and 205 MBOED from the Bakken. The average realized price fell by 19% to $45.77 per BOE from $56.56. The news indicates ConocoPhillips' performance amidst changing global energy market dynamics, managing to maintain profitability despite challenges.

data.title: WSCA appoints Matt Capalby as Industry Liaison in AZ, representing union-signatory heavy civil contractors. Capalby, a third-generation Arizona native and military veteran, brings over 30 years of experience in the industry.
data.description: In an announcement made today by the Western States Contractors Association, consultant Matt Capalby has been appointed as the Industry Liaison for WSCA in Arizona. In this new capacity, Capalby will act as the representative for union-signatory heavy civil contractors in Arizona, working on forging pivotal connections with transportation agencies and government figures. With over three decades of expertise in Arizona, Capalby, a third-generation Arizona local and military veteran, is well-positioned to fulfill this role effectively.

data.title: Deckard Technologies acquires AllTheRooms, enhancing short-term rental compliance services in San Diego.
data.description: A technology company based in San Diego, GovTech Deckard Technologies, has recently purchased the short-term rental analytics and data group, AllTheRooms. This move aims to enhance its short-term rental compliance services by incorporating AllTheRooms' expertise. The acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, with the merger of these two entities bringing valuable insights and capabilities to the table. This strategic decision is expected to streamline operations and potentially improve offerings in the short-term rental sector.

data.title: Maya Kaimal launches Chickpea Masala Burger exclusively at Sprouts in August with Actual Veggies.
data.description: A Chickpea Masala Burger will make its debut exclusively at Sprouts this August. Actual Veggies, a prominent CPG company recognized for its chef-inspired veggie burgers and vegetable-focused offerings, revealed their inaugural collaborative product. The Chickpea Masala Burger is set to hit shelves in New York on August 7, 2025. This unique burger marks a new venture for Actual Veggies and aims to cater to health-conscious consumers looking for flavorful vegetarian options.

data.title: Washington Trust named among RI's healthiest employers for 4th consecutive year by PBN, among 27 organizations selected.
data.description: A recent announcement from Westerly, R.I. stated that Washington Trust has received recognition for the fourth consecutive year, being named one of the healthiest employers in Rhode Island by Providence Business News. The bank was chosen as one of 27 organizations achieving this accolade in 2025.

data.title: MGK to host first Monster Energy MGK Day Celebrity Shootout powered by Webull on Aug 10, 2025 in Cleveland.
data.description: On August 10th, 2025, an eventful day is planned at Mall C in Downtown Cleveland. Commencing with the Celebrity Game, the festivities will continue with a performance by MGK. The inaugural Monster Energy Celebrity Shootout, supported by Webull, will add more excitement to MGK Day. This event is part of the series of celebrations and activities in Cleveland.

data.title: Wing Zone Hot Chicken & Wings will open its first location in Reno on August 19, 2025, offering award-winning, cooked-to-order Nashville chicken.
data.description: A popular Nashville chicken franchise known for its award-winning, made-to-order hot and juicy chicken wings with bold sauces, Wing Zone Hot Chicken & Wings, is set to open in Reno on August 19, 2025. This franchise has garnered recognition for its high-quality food and unique flavors. Residents of Reno can look forward to experiencing the heat and taste of Wing Zone's range of offerings.

data.title: Nathan Carmon appointed as COO of Robots & Pencils to drive growth and operational efficiency.
data.description: A highly experienced leader in transformation has joined the executive team at Robots & Pencils on August 7, 2025, aiming to expand AI-first initiatives, enhance client services, and improve operational performance. Based in Cleveland, the firm is renowned globally for its digital innovation services, focusing on cloud-native applications for web and mobile platforms.

data.title: Investors in Sable Offshore Corp. (NYSE: SOC) advised of Sept. 26, 2025 deadline for class action lawsuit, by Berger Montague PC.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, a class action lawsuit was filed by the national plaintiffs' law firm Berger Montague PC against Sable Offshore Corp. (NYSE: SOC) on behalf of investors who bought or acquired publicly traded securities of Sable. The lawsuit was announced in Philadelphia and involves allegations of misconduct by the Company. Sable Offshore Corp. is facing legal action from investors, and this case could potentially impact a significant number of individuals who invested in the company.

data.title: 5WPR, a top PR firm, chosen as Acme Smoked Fish's agency of record. Leading in premium smoked seafood.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, 5WPR, a prominent PR firm in the United States, has been appointed as the agency of record for Acme Smoked Fish, a top player in premium smoked seafood based in Brooklyn. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for 5WPR as it continues to solidify its position in the industry. The agreement is set to enhance Acme Smoked Fish's marketing strategies and is anticipated to greatly benefit both companies.

data.title: Girls Inc and DPR sponsored a Design & Build Camp in Philadelphia to inspire young women into construction careers.
data.description: In Philadelphia on August 7, 2025, DPR Construction, a leading technical company, is spearheading a program that allows girls to engage in hands-on learning and contribute to bridging the skilled labor gap. This initiative enables young women to explore and gain knowledge in the built environment, providing them with valuable real-world experience. This initiative aims to address the disparity in skilled labor by involving young females in practical learning experiences.

data.title: Residence Inn Rochester Henrietta by Marriott finishes renovation, enhancing guest experience. Located at 1300 Jefferson.
data.description: In Rochester, New York, Buffalo Lodging Associates, LLC recently announced the completion of renovations for the Residence Inn by Marriott Rochester Henrietta. The hotel, situated at 1300 Jefferson, has undergone upgrades to enhance guest comfort and modernity, reflecting the company's dedication to providing an elevated experience.
BREAKING: Elias Rodriguez, suspect in deadly shooting of 2 Israeli Embassy staffers, indicted on federal hate crime charges. DOJ weighing death penalty, says U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro.

data.title: Bitcoin and ethereum surge to August highs as Trump plans to add cryptos to 401(k) plans in new EO.
data.description: Bitcoin and ethereum have experienced significant increases in value, reaching highs not seen since August. This surge comes as President Trump prepares to reveal an executive order that will include cryptocurrencies in 401(k) retirement plans. The move is expected to integrate digital assets into traditional investment portfolios, potentially impacting a large number of individuals saving for retirement. This development has sparked enthusiasm among investors and analysts, as it signifies a growing acceptance of cryptocurrency within the mainstream financial sector.

data.title: IonQ reported larger Q2 loss than expected, but revenue exceeded views. Analyst downgrades stock due to growing risks.
data.description: Commencing the financial report for quantum computing companies, IonQ unveiled a larger-than-anticipated Q2 loss alongside revenue that exceeded expectations. In light of this, an analyst downgraded IonQ due to escalating risks.
